note: Balancer V3 Router v2 user pre-sign surface triage (deeper-onboarding pass 2026-06-03). Manifests now cover single-token swaps, multicall, single-token add/remove liquidity, AND permitBatchAndCall (the dominant entry — 91.7% of recent direct Router tx, decoded via multicall_recurse over multicallData). Proportional/unbalanced liquidity stays deferred (amounts[]-only, pool-token list not in calldata → needs a decode-time resolver). donate/initialize/custom/hook excluded with reasons.

0x0ca078ec.name: addLiquidityCustom
0x0ca078ec.reason: deferred user liquidity path: custom userData and dynamic pool-token amount arrays require a pool token resolver before faithful add_liquidity emission

0x5b343791.name: addLiquidityHook
0x5b343791.reason: Vault callback hook path; users call Router entry points, not hook functions directly

0x724dba33.name: addLiquidityProportional
0x724dba33.reason: DEFERRED user liquidity path: maxAmountsIn[] is amounts-ONLY (the pool token list is NOT in calldata); faithful add_liquidity tokens need a decode-time pool-token resolver, which is not wired (live_inputs are eval-time, not decode-time). Measured 0.6% of recent direct Router tx. Follow-up.

0x72657d17.name: addLiquiditySingleTokenExactOut
0x72657d17.reason: user liquidity action: single-token add (tokenIn + maxAmountIn in calldata → add_liquidity Pooled, 1-element tokens). Covered by router-add-liquidity-single-token-exact-out manifest.

0xc08bc851.name: addLiquidityUnbalanced
0xc08bc851.reason: DEFERRED user liquidity path: exactAmountsIn[] is amounts-ONLY (pool token list NOT in calldata); needs a decode-time pool-token resolver (unwired). Measured 0.5% of recent direct Router tx. Follow-up.

0xbf6ee3fd.name: donate
0xbf6ee3fd.reason: donation path has no current ActionBody model and must not be mislabeled as swap/liquidity

0x026b3d95.name: initialize
0x026b3d95.reason: DEFERRED pool bootstrap/initialization (one-time pool creation, not a recurring retail swap/liquidity action). Measured 2.3% of recent direct Router tx (pool creators). Follow-up if retail pool-creation coverage is desired.

0x086fad66.name: initializeHook
0x086fad66.reason: Vault callback hook path; users call Router entry points, not hook functions directly

0xac9650d8.name: multicall
0xac9650d8.reason: wrapper: recursively decodes bytes[] child Router calls so bundled user actions keep concrete ActionBody shapes

0x19c6989f.name: permitBatchAndCall
0x19c6989f.reason: user wrapper (DOMINANT entry — 91.7% of recent direct Router tx): multicall_recurse over multicallData decodes each child Router self-call (swaps + single-token liquidity) to concrete ActionBody; deferred-liquidity children are skipped. LIMITATION (documented in manifest): the bundled Permit2 batch grant is not separately surfaced.
